image:image.image:title: Yasin Engin Network Automation and Future Networks Portfolio
image:image.image:caption: Social preview for Yasin Engin, focused on network automation, SDN, NDN, Go backend systems, and reproducible network labs.

image:image.image:title: Yasin Engin CV Social Preview
image:image.image:caption: CV preview for Network Automation and Future Networks engineering work.

image:image.image:title: Yasin Engin Projects Social Preview
image:image.image:caption: Featured projects across network automation, distributed systems, firmware update workflows, and NDN simulation labs.

image:image.image:title: Yasin Engin Engineering Notes Social Preview
image:image.image:caption: Technical notes on network automation, gRPC API design, incident response, and production checklists.

image:image.image:title: Netreka Academy Videos Social Preview
image:image.image:caption: Video tutorials and lab notes from Netreka Academy.

image:image.image:title: Netreka Academy
image:image.image:caption: Netreka Academy learning initiative by Yasin Engin.

image:image.image:title: Yasin Engin Research Library Social Preview
image:image.image:caption: Research library covering LEO satellite networking, NDN, network automation, and distributed control-plane systems.

image:image.image:title: Netreka Nexus Social Preview
image:image.image:caption: Community and learning system for Netreka Academy.

image:image.image:title: Tolerex Distributed Storage Social Preview
image:image.image:caption: Fault-tolerant distributed storage system in Go and gRPC.

image:image.image:title: Rehydrator Firmware Update Social Preview
image:image.image:caption: CC1352R Contiki-NG OAD firmware update and TI BIM compatibility project.

image:image.image:title: Network Automation Labs Social Preview
image:image.image:caption: Nokia SR Linux, Containerlab, Ansible, gNMI, YANG, and reproducible automation labs.

image:image.image:title: Go Network Programming Social Preview
image:image.image:caption: Go backend and network programming experiments for protocols, sockets, and services.

image:image.image:title: NDN Simulation Labs Social Preview
image:image.image:caption: Named Data Networking experiments with ndnSIM, NS-3, NFD, caching, and forwarding strategies.

image:image.image:title: CCNP Labs Social Preview
image:image.image:caption: CCNP Enterprise lab notes, routing and switching practice, and automation scripts.
